overall.description: A third-person perspective gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending and descending monumental staircases in Corpo Plaza. The character moves through a futuristic urban environment transitioning from covered indoor areas with green metallic architecture and digital billboards to an outdoor plaza surrounded by towering corporate skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered monumental staircase with digital art display

events.description: entering the covered staircase area with green metallic walls
continuing ascent while passing pedestrians descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: following a woman in white clothing up the wide staircase, passing other pedestrians going up and down

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and light pants walking up stairs ahead of ego
man in brown jacket walking down stairs passing ego

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps ascending between green metallic walls
large vertical digital display showing a classical-style statue figure
tall angled walls with greenish metallic finish lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide covered staircase flanked by green metallic walls, following a woman in white toward a large digital screen displaying a statue. Other pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction in this sheltered, artificially lit transit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor transit plaza with digital advertising

events.description: exiting staircase into indoor plaza area with polished marble flooring
turning right to explore the plaza and observe digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor plaza, turning to observe the digital billboards and surroundings

entered.detail: polished marble tile flooring reflecting the overhead lighting
large yellow digital billboard displaying 'ALL FOODS' advertisement
opening to lower level with visible escalator structure

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters an indoor plaza with polished marble floors and turns to observe large digital billboards including a prominent yellow 'All Foods' advertisement. The space is brightly lit with artificial lighting and features access to lower levels via escalators.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase leading to outdoor plaza

events.description: turning back and entering descending staircase toward outdoor area
emerging from artificial indoor lighting into natural daylight

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs toward the outdoor plaza, passing two men in red outfits coming up

notable_agents.action: two men in red athletic wear walking up the stairs toward ego

entered.detail: concrete staircase descending between enclosed green metallic walls
bright opening at the top of the stairs leading to outdoor area
yellow elevated monorail or transit track visible above the exit

segments.scene_description: The character turns back and descends a separate staircase toward the outdoor plaza, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting. Two men in red athletic wear ascend the stairs as the character approaches the bright outdoor exit, with a yellow elevated transit structure visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor corporate plaza with seating and towering skyscrapers

events.description: exiting to outdoor plaza with corporate buildings and greenery
tilting camera upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor plaza, passing people seated on illuminated benches, then looking up at the towering corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket sitting on illuminated bench
pedestrian in teal outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: tiled pedestrian plaza with geometric patterns
tall dark building with large illuminated 'M' logo and corporate signage
raised planters containing bushes and small trees
modern benches with glowing blue light strips underneath
large digital screens mounted on building walls displaying advertisements
massive skyscrapers with dark facades extending into the sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide outdoor corporate plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers including the Militech building. Walking past illuminated benches where people sit, the character continues along the tiled path before tilting the camera upward to gaze at the massive corporate towers with steam vents visible against the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, artificially lit transit hub into the expansive, sun-drenched scale of a corporate outdoor plaza. It begins by ascending a wide staircase flanked by green metallic walls, following a woman in white past pedestrians toward a large digital screen. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into an indoor plaza of polished marble floors and bright digital billboards, including a prominent yellow All Foods advertisement. The camera then turns to descend a separate staircase, transitioning from artificial light to natural brightness as it passes men in red athletic wear and moves beneath a yellow elevated transit structure. Finally, the character emerges into the wide outdoor plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers, passing illuminated benches before tilting upward to gaze at the massive corporate towers and steam vents against the sky.
